name: OpenIPAHound 94 Utility - Hostgroup Nested Members
description: Expands computer/hostgroup membership up to three IPA_MemberOf hops for every FreeIPA hostgroup. Use this to explain why a host is inside an HBAC or sudo target set.
query:
MATCH p=(member)-[:IPA_MemberOf*1..3]->(hostgroup:IPA_HostGroup)
WHERE member:IPA_Computer OR member:IPA_HostGroup
RETURN p, hostgroup.cn AS hostgroup_cn, coalesce(member.fqdn, member.cn) AS member_name
LIMIT 1000
